title: Wood Conversion
description: Convert logs and planks between wood types using dyes!
body:
![Logo for the wood conversion datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6894ffc2f017f7e6369c0495d3e630b3e4404bce.png)

## What?
This data pack allows for the conversion of wooden planks and logs between different wood types using dyes. 
Just add 8 planks or 8 logs of any type with one of the listed dyes in your crafting table!

For wooden planks, all current vanilla wood types are supported (overworld trees, bamboo & crimson and warped).
For logs, all except bamboo, as there is no perfectly equivalent block in the bamboo set.

## Why?
Avoid having to plant several different trees, that might look out of place in your base and might be painful to farm (looking at you, mangrove!).

Also, I always felt that wooden planks should not be differentiated by species, but by colour, with 16 types corresponding to the 16 dyes. Thus even with less than 16 tree variants, wood would fill out all standard vanilla colour niches. This data pack simulates that to some degree.

## Dyes!
Here's a list of which dye is used for which wood type:
- white > birch
- gray > oak
- black > dark oak
- brown > spruce
- green > jungle
- orange > acacia
- yellow > bamboo (only planks)
- red > mangrove
- magenta > crimson
- cyan > warped
- pink > cherry

## Mod Support
Currently, no mod support is planned, especially because this is limited to 16 dyes.

## Fox' Utilities
This is my very first publicly released data pack. It is also the first in a series of small utility data packs (called Fox' Utilities) that I plan to release in the coming weeks or so.

## Credit
The logo was made by myself using official Minecraft assets, courtesy of Minecraft and Mojang. 
The title was made using the "Minecraft Title Generator" plugin for blockbench. All assets belong to their respective creators or owners.
